chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-200 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-08-2025 Mr. Ameer Imtiaz Hussain Solangi, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w Inspector Mashooq, SHO, P.S, Gambat, SIP Talib Hussain of P.S, Agra and ASI Sibghatullah, of P.S. Agra. **** Mr. Akhtiar Ahmed Hisbani, Advocate, files Vakalatnama along with objections on behalf of private respondents No.7, 10 and 11, wherein they categorically denied to have caused any sort of harassment to the petitioner through police. Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5. The police officials present in Court also deny having caused any harassment to the petitioner; however, they submit that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the petitioner. In view of the above statements, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect any criminal, civil, or family proceedings, if pending between the parties before the competent Courts of law. JUDGE Ahmad
